{{Quote|Well spoken, Viscount. It is ''rumored'' that you ''alone'' of the entire Rebel Alliance possess the ''stature'' in inter-galactic finance as well as the ''ceremonial'' skill that is essential to complete a major transaction with the Bank of Aargau.|[[Rolex]]|<ref name="marvel48" />}}
[[Viscount (title)/Legends|Viscount]] '''Tardi''' was the [[Minister of Finance (Alliance)/Legends|Minister of Finance]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A wealthy financier who was known for his ceremonial skill as well as his place in [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] finance, in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Tardi worked with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] to negotiate a large sale of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] for the Rebel [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. Tardi and Organa made plans to finance the transaction through the [[Bank of Aargau/Legends|Bank of Aargau]], but Tardi [[Death/Legends|died]] about a month before their trip to [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]] was scheduled. As Tardi's presence was crucial for the transaction going through, the Rebels faked his presence with a [[Tardi (droid)|replica droid]].<ref name="marvel48" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tardi was first mentioned in [[Star Wars (1977) 48|''Star Wars'' (1977) 48]], written by [[Larry Hama]] and released in [[1981]]. Although a replica droid posing as Tardi appears in the comic, Tardi himself is revealed to be dead at the story's climax.<ref name="marvel48" />
